name: Chocolate Walnut Squares
recipeIngredient: 3 ounces bittersweet or semisweet chocolate, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C). Set a rack in the middle of the oven.
2. Butter an 8-inch square pan and line the bottom with parchment paper.
3. In a bowl, combine the walnuts and flour; set aside.
4. In a medium bowl, whisk together eggs, salt, and rum until well combined.
5. In a saucepan, stir sugar and corn syrup until blended. Place over low heat and bring to a boil.
6. Remove from heat and add chocolate and butter. Allow to stand for 3-4 minutes before whisking smooth.
7. Whisk the chocolate mixture into the egg mixture. Stir in the walnuts and flour.
8. Pour batter into prepared pan. Bake for 35 minutes or until set and firm.
9. Cool in pan on rack. Unmold and cut into 2-inch squares.
10. Yield: sixteen 2-inch squares
